name: 23 Kitchens
description: Come play pickleball at 23 Kitchens in Lacey, WA! There are 11 hard courts. 5 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, food, and water. The courts can be reserved.
fees: Members only — $40 for One Hour, $60 for Two Hours

name: Breckenridge Apartment Homes
description: For residents only. Clubhouse key required.

name: Briggs Community YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Briggs Community YMCA in Olympia, WA! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Clearwood Community Association
description: Come play pickleball at Clearwood Community Association in United States, WA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Edgewater Park
description: Private court for Jubilee and Edgewater residents only

name: Egg Lake Court
description: Egg Lake Court is a place to play pickleball in United States, WA. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private.

name: Friendly Grove Park
description: Friendly Grove Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Olympia, WA. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The court is free.

description: Kala Point Village is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, WA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Olympia Golf and Country Club
description: Olympia Golf and Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Olympia, WA. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. name: Rainier City Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Rainier City Pickleball Courts in Rainier, WA! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights and restrooms.

name: Rainier Vista Community Park
description: Rainier Vista tennis court have just been resurfaced and added lines for 8 more PB courts.

name: Steamboat Tennis & Athletic Club
description: Steamboat Tennis & Athletic Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Olympia, WA. There are 8 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Stevens Field
description: Stevens Field is a place to play pickleball in Olympia, WA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: SunLand Community Courts
description: SunLand Community Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in United States, WA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: The Olympia Center
description: 3 portable courts are set-up in the gym which is located on the 2nd floor of The Olympia Center.  Players check-in at the customer service kiosk to sign in and pay their drop-in fees before going up to the gym to play.  Players self-manage the rotation of play.

name: The Valley Athletic Club
description: Come play pickleball at The Valley Athletic Club in Tumwater, WA! There are 8 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. You can reserve the courts.

name: Wilson Sports & Fitness Center
description: Wilson Sports & Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in United States, WA. There are 4 indoor wood and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Free to All DOD/MWR Eligible Patrons
